sentences.text: Thank you for calling town. One. If you know your party's extension you can dial it at any time or press pound for the company directory. If you would like to make the leasing our property inquiries press one. If you are an existing tenant please press two please hold while your call is being transferred to extension number. Two zero zero one.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and James Horvath @ Town West Realty
